title: VoiceAnnotationFile
description: Top-level schema for a voice/audio annotation export file

audio_id.description: Filename or unique identifier of the source audio file (e.g. sample_001.wav)

annotations.description: Ordered list of annotation segments for this audio file

start_time.description: Segment start time in seconds (2 decimal places). Must be < end_time.

end_time.description: Segment end time in seconds (2 decimal places). Must be > start_time.

speaker.description: Speaker identifier. Format: SPEAKER_XX where XX is a zero-padded two-digit number (e.g. SPEAKER_01).

transcript.description: Verbatim transcription of the spoken content. Must not be empty. Use [INAUDIBLE] for unintelligible speech.

intent.description: Communicative intent of the utterance. Choose the most dominant intent.

emotion.description: Perceived emotional tone of the speaker (not the topic). Default to neutral when ambiguous.

noise_type.description: Dominant background noise type during this segment. Use 'none' for clean recordings.

quality_flag.description: Overall usability rating of the segment for AI training.

notes.description: Optional free-text for annotator comments, edge cases, or ambiguities.
